import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import ta

def generate_signals(df, params):
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    rsi_overbought = params['rsi_overbought']
    rsi_oversold = params['rsi_oversold']
    
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)
    atr = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window)
    
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    signals[(rsi > rsi_overbought) & (df['high'] - df['close'] > atr)] = -1
    signals[(rsi < rsi_oversold) & (df['close'] - df['low'] > atr)] = 1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits momentum reversal behavior where extreme RSI levels combined with price exceeding ATR-based thresholds signal high-probability reversals.
